extraction.one_line_summary: CALMEJANE Lilian won from the break after surviving cramps at 5km out, holding off HESJEDAL by margins under 15 seconds on final climb.
tactical_patterns: Sky split tactics: planted Henao and Kwiatkowski in break despite both being GC threats, but still had to chase.
ROCHE Nicolas bridged from second group to leaders then past them before Calmejane's decisive counter-attack on final climb.
Sky nearly lost yellow through Kwiatkowski descending too fast for teammates, causing Thomas and Froome off-road excursion mid-stage.

rider_signals.CALMEJANE Lilian: positive: won despite severe cramping at 5km mark, demonstrated unusual mental composure for 24-year-old first-time stage winner under extreme physical duress
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: crashed off-road carrying team bottles but immediately returned to do heavy work for Froome in finale
rider_signals.ROCHE Nicolas: positive: bridged between groups and attacked past early break leaders on final climb, forcing Calmejane's winning move
rider_signals.ARU Fabio: neutral: finished 50 seconds down but took 10 points on category-1 Pluie climb, one point behind KOM lead
rider_signals.BROWN Nathan: positive: unexpectedly finished with GC group 50 seconds behind winner on selective mountain stage
